name: Sheryl Bailey
abstract: Sheryl Bailey (born May 20, 1966) is an American jazz guitarist and educator. She teaches guitar at the Berklee College of Music in Boston.

interviews.title: Sheryl Bailey interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 24, 2023

concerts.label: David Krakauer's Klezmer Madness! with Special Guest Uri Caine, Piano
David Krakauer's Klezmer Madness! with Special Guest Fred Wesley
Klezmer All-Star Bash
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

quotes.text: Um hum. Yeah well you know what’s a great — on a different art form, stand-up comedy is Joan Rivers. I recommend this movie, “Joan Rivers: A Piece of Work.” That first twenty minutes of that movie really shows a working freelance artist. That woman hustled gigs to the day she died. And you know she was like sometimes you’re playing at the biggest hall in Vegas or whatever and you’ve got a long one, sometimes you’re doing a bar mitzvah. You do everything with the same integrity. They’re not different — and I know that with Gene. If he’s playing a wedding or a birthday party, he’s playing with the same integrity that he does if he’s playing at Carnegie Hall. That’s your professional acumen. That’s what you bring to everything. You know you don’t go ah, I’m going to play for a bunch of loons over here. You would never do that I guess because it is that thing of every time you get a chance to play or perform it is a gift. It really is a gift that you’re sharing. Not everybody gets to do that and see what we see.
quotes.caption: General reflection on professional integrity at Carnegie Hall
quotes.doc_title: Sheryl Bailey interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 24, 2023
